adb84d.source: Localized FRBs (ApJ adb84d, full DM budget)
adb84d.note: Omega_b(FRB) = 0.0483 +/- 0.0072 (syst-dominated; stat 0.0001); TFPT 0.0489 at 0.1 sigma; Planck 0.0493 at 0.1 sigma

sharma2024.note: Omega_b(FRB) = 0.0663 +/- 0.0103 (syst-dominated; stat 0.0027); TFPT 0.0489 at 1.7 sigma; Planck 0.0493 at 1.6 sigma

matches.name: FRB 20180916B
matches.reference: CHIME/FRB Collab. 2020 (Nature 582, 351; arXiv:2001.10275): P=16.35+/-0.15 d, ~5 d activity window, ~50% within ~0.6 d

matches.name: FRB 20121102A
matches.reference: Rajwade et al. 2020 (MNRAS 495, 3551): P~157 d, active duty cycle ~53% (=> W_broad ~ 0.53 P); no well-defined narrow core window

per_source.note: 2 periodic repeaters; 1 match W_broad/P~8/27 within 5%. n is too small for a population claim -- a candidate match, not evidence.

population.verdict: candidate only: 1/2 broad matches but n=2 < 5 required periodic repeaters

data_derived_FRB20180916B.note: data-derived HDI windows from 33 folded bursts (90%/50% phase arcs); vs 8/27 (54%), 1/27 (4%)

FRB02_echo_ratio.verdict: theory channels null; no audit anomaly

n_accounting.note: n_raw = rows in the v5 CSV (S/N>20 catalogue)

FRB01_dispersion.verdict: no native dispersion required: the fitted non-plasma nu^-3 term implies an extra cross-band delay BELOW the ToA precision in all 2 source(s) (worst delay/precision = 3.1e-15) -> consistent with TFPT's shared Lorentz cone; FRB.01 not falsified

fast_spacing_ladder.verdict: 3 clusters but no uniform kernel spacing (closest (3/2)^3=27/8 at 77%)

score_split.note: structure_score (real but NOT TFPT-specific) is kept out of the kernel verdict; only kernel_score reflects a frozen-ratio match.

shared_kernel.verdict: no shared kernel eigenvalue (max 1 channel); memory coefficients consistent with weak/no AR(1) recovery

FAST 1652.note: VAR(1) on ['log_energy', 'dm_resid']: |eig(A)|=[0.341, 0.072]; nearest kernel rel-errs=[0.02, 0.18]; row-shuffle p=0.002

FRB 20240114A pol.note: VAR(1) on ['rm_resid', 'dm_resid', 'pa_sin', 'pa_cos', 'linear_frac']: |eig(A)|=[0.757, 0.133, 0.084, 0.049, 0.038]; nearest kernel rel-errs=[0.14, 0.51, 0.04, 0.44, 0.57]; row-shuffle p=0.002

chime_drift.note: 42 multi-component bursts; signed-drift GMM best_k=2 (dBIC=5.7); downward 76% is the standard sad-trombone
